name: Redis RCE — Crontab Injection
description: Redis CONFIG SET dir targeting a cron path (/var/spool/cron, /etc/cron.d, crontabs) — exploits Redis file persistence to write malicious cron entries for scheduled task persistence. Technique observed in strapi-plugin-cron / strapi-plugin-events supply-chain attack.

patterns.message: Redis RCE: CONFIG SET dir targets a cron path — exploits Redis to write cron entries for persistence.
